UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific settings and profile information.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a single financial transaction (income or expense).

uid.description: The ID of the user who owns this transaction.

type.description: Whether it's money coming in or going out.

category.description: The category of the transaction (e.g., Food, Salary).

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

isInstallment.description: Whether the purchase is in installments.

billingCycle.description: The billing cycle for non-installment credit card purchases.

bank.description: The bank associated with the credit card.
